title: bolbitis lianhuachihensis
intro: Bolbitis lianhuachihensis, also known as the 'Huang Qi' or 'Huang Qi Plant', is a type of fern native to Taiwan. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome, which is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Bolbitis lianhuachihensis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome is often dried, powdered, and used in decoctions or added to ointments for topical application.
